Prasanna Malode

Global Head — DevSecOps, Cybersecurity & IT Operations · Bengaluru, India

I'm a Director/VP-level technology leader with 20+ years bridging CXO strategy with ground-level engineering execution. Currently leading global IT, DevOps, Cybersecurity, and IT Service Operations at IP Infusion.

My belief: Speed, Security, and Reliability are not trade-offs — they are the foundation of scale.

I hold an MBA, MSc (Electronics), PGDCA, PMP, and ITIL Foundation.
